projectDescription: A Laravel web application for Halcon construction materials distributor that automates internal order management with role-based dashboards and a client tracking portal.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with 6 distinct departmental roles (Admin, Sales, Purchasing, Warehouse, Route, Client)
Full order lifecycle management from registration to delivery with photographic evidence
Client portal for order tracking by customer number and invoice number
Soft-delete for orders with restore capability
Administrative user management — only admins can register new users and assign roles
Order status workflow: Ordered → In Process → In Route → Delivered
Photographic evidence upload for delivery confirmation (Route role)
Material and inventory management for warehouse operations
publicApiSurface: Resource: users (Admin only) — CRUD user management
PUT /orders/{order} — Update order status and upload evidence photo
